message.content: Put out all the changes to /products/tasks/backend and /frontend as a stacked PR on top of the current one. Use Graphite

content.text: Let me first understand the current branch state and the relevant changes.

input.description: Check diff stats for tasks backend and frontend

content.text: Now let me create a stacked branch with these changes using Graphite.

input.command: which gt 2>/dev/null && gt --version 2>/dev/null || echo "gt not found"
input.description: Check if Graphite CLI is available

input.command: gt branch create signals/reviewer-ui-and-tasks-fixes -m "feat: suggested reviewers UI and tasks log parsing improvements"
